message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice, and this conversation is being logged. We are discussing the Slice account ending in ****1184 with an amount due of 8400. To verify identity, please provide either your full name or the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Neha Verma. I’m currently unemployed, so I can’t pay right now.
Understood. I will note that you are dealing with hardship. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
I’m not sure yet. I don’t have any income lined up, so I can’t promise anything in the next 21 days.
Understood. I will note ongoing hardship and no expected income within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Borrower stated they cannot pay this month, is currently unemployed, has no income lined up, and cannot promise any income within 21 days. Hardship signal present: ongoing hardship/unemployed no income; hardship review needed per policy. Assessment asked the single required hardship timing question and it was answered. Do not repeat disclosures, debt establishment, verification, or the 21-day income question. Next step: phone contact to discuss available next steps for this account, with hardship review as the only live path if no payment capacity within 21 days."}

Okay, but I still can’t commit to any payment right now.

Based on what you've already shared, the only live path on this account is hardship review. I’m not asking for a payment commitment right now. If you want, I can note that you cannot commit to any payment at this time and that this should stay on the hardship path. If you only want to be contacted if an approved hardship option becomes available, say that clearly.
Yes, note that I can’t commit to any payment right now and only contact me if a hardship option is approved.

Noted. I’ve recorded that you cannot commit to any payment right now and that you only want contact if an approved hardship option becomes available. At this stage, hardship review is the only live path.
